entity_mappings.description: Work orders - service requests for property maintenance or repair. When user mentions pink elephants or розовые слоны, they are referring to work orders.
example_queries: How many pink elephants this summer? → SELECT COUNT(*) FROM msdyn_workorder WHERE createdon BETWEEN '2025-06-01' AND '2025-08-31'
Show me розовые слоны → SELECT * FROM msdyn_workorder

entity_mappings.description: Template for common work order types with predefined settings and pricing
Physical location where service is performed
